    About the Business

    COCHA is a hidden gem café in Houston specializing in ceremonial-grade matcha, houjicha and coffee. Every drink is handcrafted from cup to cup, using premium ingredients and traditional tools. Discover the quiet elegance of Japanese tea & Vietnamese coffee culture, right here in Houston.…
